schema.description: A financial data service providing real-time and historical stock prices, financial statements, dividends, earnings information, news, analyst recommendations, and options data from Yahoo Finance.

tools.name: get_current_stock_price
tools.description: Retrieve the current real-time market price (last traded price) for a given stock symbol.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

current_price.description: The current market price as a formatted string representing the most recent transaction price on the exchange (e.g., '150.25' for $150.25).

tools.name: get_stock_price_by_date
tools.description: Retrieve the opening and closing stock prices for a given stock symbol on a specific trading date.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

date.description: The trading date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2024-01-15'). Must be a valid trading day, excluding weekends and market holidays.
The trading date in YYYY-MM-DD format for which price data is returned.

open.description: The opening price (first trade price of the day), indicating market sentiment at the start of trading.

close.description: The closing price (last trade price of the day), commonly used as a reference point for daily price movements.

tools.name: get_stock_price_date_range
tools.description: Retrieve historical daily closing prices for a given stock symbol over a specified date range.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

start_date.description: The start date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for the historical price range (e.g., '2024-01-01').

end_date.description: The end date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for the historical price range (e.g., '2024-12-31').

closing_prices.description: A dictionary mapping trading dates (YYYY-MM-DD) to closing prices. Only includes trading days, excluding weekends and market holidays.

additionalProperties.description: The closing price for the given trading date.

tools.name: get_historical_stock_prices
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive historical OHLC (open, high, low, close) price data and volume for a given stock symbol with flexible period and interval options.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

period.description: Time period for historical data. Options: '1d', '5d' (trading days), '1mo', '3mo', '6mo' (months), '1y', '2y', '5y', '10y' (years), 'ytd' (year to date), 'max' (maximum available). Default: '1mo'.

interval.description: Data sampling interval. Options: '1d' (daily), '5d' (every 5 days), '1wk' (weekly), '1mo' (monthly), '3mo' (quarterly). Default: '1d'.

price_history.description: An array of historical price data objects for each time interval within the specified period.

date.description: The date of the price data point in YYYY-MM-DD format.

open.description: The opening price for the interval.

high.description: The highest price reached during the interval.

low.description: The lowest price reached during the interval.

close.description: The closing price for the interval.

volume.description: The total number of shares traded during the interval.

tools.name: get_dividends
tools.description: Retrieve dividend payment history for a given stock symbol, optionally filtered by date range.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

start_date.description: Start date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for filtering dividend history. If omitted, returns all available historical dividends.

end_date.description: End date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for filtering dividend history. If omitted, returns dividends up to the most recent payment.

dividends.description: A dictionary mapping dividend payment dates (ex-dividend dates) to dividend amounts per share in the stock's currency.

additionalProperties.description: The dividend amount per share paid on the given date.

tools.name: get_income_statement
tools.description: Retrieve the income statement (profit and loss statement) for a given stock symbol, showing revenues, expenses, and profitability metrics.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

freq.description: Reporting frequency for financial statements. Options: 'yearly' (annual fiscal year), 'quarterly' (Q1-Q4), 'trailing' (trailing twelve months/TTM). Default: 'yearly'.

income_statements.description: Income statement data organized by reporting period, containing financial metrics such as totalRevenue, costOfRevenue, grossProfit, operatingIncome, netIncome, and earningsPerShare.

additionalProperties.description: Financial metrics for a specific reporting period.

tools.name: get_cashflow
tools.description: Retrieve the cash flow statement for a given stock symbol, showing cash movements through operating, investing, and financing activities.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

freq.description: Reporting frequency for financial statements. Options: 'yearly' (annual fiscal year), 'quarterly' (Q1-Q4), 'trailing' (trailing twelve months/TTM). Default: 'yearly'.

cashflow_statements.description: Cash flow statement data organized by reporting period, containing metrics such as operatingCashFlow, capitalExpenditure, freeCashFlow, and netBorrowings.

additionalProperties.description: Cash flow metrics for a specific reporting period.

tools.name: get_earning_dates
tools.description: Retrieve historical and upcoming earnings announcement dates for a given stock symbol, including actual and estimated EPS data.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

limit.description: Maximum number of earnings dates to return, combining both past and upcoming dates. Default: 12.

earnings_dates.description: An array of earnings announcement records including both historical results and future estimates.

date.description: The earnings announcement date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

type.description: The type of earnings report: 'quarterly' or 'annual'.

actualEPS.description: The actual reported earnings per share. Null for upcoming earnings dates.

estimatedEPS.description: The analyst consensus estimated earnings per share.

surprise.description: The difference between actual and estimated EPS. Null for upcoming earnings dates.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Retrieve news articles and press releases related to a given stock symbol, optionally filtered by date range.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

start_date.description: Start date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for filtering news articles. If omitted, returns the most recent news without a lower date bound.

end_date.description: End date (inclusive) in YYYY-MM-DD format for filtering news articles. If omitted, returns news up to the current date.

limit.description: Maximum number of news articles to return. Default: 50.

news_articles.description: An array of news items sorted by relevance and recency.

title.description: The headline of the news article.

link.description: The URL to the full news article.

publisher.description: The name of the news source or publisher.

publishDate.description: The publication date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

summary.description: A brief summary or excerpt of the news article content.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Retrieve analyst recommendations and price targets for a given stock symbol from financial research firms and investment banks.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

recommendations.description: An array of analyst recommendation records from various financial institutions.

firm.description: The name of the financial research firm or investment bank issuing the recommendation.

rating.description: The analyst rating. Common values: 'Strong Buy', 'Buy', 'Hold', 'Underperform', 'Sell'.

priceTarget.description: The analyst's expected future stock price. May be null if no price target is provided.

date.description: The date the recommendation was issued in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_option_expiration_dates
tools.description: Retrieve all available options expiration dates for a given stock symbol, including weekly and monthly expirations.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

expiration_dates.description: An array of available options expiration dates in YYYY-MM-DD format, sorted chronologically. Includes both weekly and monthly expirations.

items.description: An options expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_option_chain
tools.description: Retrieve the complete options chain (all call and put options) for a specific expiration date, including strike prices, bid/ask prices, volume, open interest, and implied volatility.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (ticker) in Yahoo Finance format (e.g., 'AAPL' for Apple Inc., 'GOOGL' for Alphabet Inc., 'MSFT' for Microsoft Corporation).

expiration_date.description: Options expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be a valid expiration date as returned by get_option_expiration_dates().

underlyingPrice.description: The current market price of the underlying stock.

calls.description: An array of call option contracts (right to buy the stock) at various strike prices.

strike.description: The strike price at which the option can be exercised.

bid.description: The highest price buyers are currently willing to pay for the option.

ask.description: The lowest price sellers are currently willing to accept for the option.

volume.description: The number of option contracts traded during the current session.

openInterest.description: The total number of outstanding option contracts that have not been settled.

impliedVolatility.description: The market's expectation of future price volatility, derived from the option's price.

puts.description: An array of put option contracts (right to sell the stock) at various strike prices.

strike.description: The strike price at which the option can be exercised.

bid.description: The highest price buyers are currently willing to pay for the option.

ask.description: The lowest price sellers are currently willing to accept for the option.

volume.description: The number of option contracts traded during the current session.

openInterest.description: The total number of outstanding option contracts that have not been settled.

impliedVolatility.description: The market's expectation of future price volatility, derived from the option's price.

scenarios.description: Basic stock price lookup for a single tech stock with minimal data
Multiple stocks with historical data, dividends, and news articles for typical portfolio tracking

AAPL.title: Apple Reports Strong Q1 Earnings
AAPL.summary: Apple Inc. reported better-than-expected earnings for Q1 2024, driven by strong iPhone sales.

TSLA.title: Tesla Announces New Model Updates
TSLA.summary: Tesla unveils significant updates to its Model 3 and Model Y lineup.

scenarios.description: Comprehensive financial data including options chains, analyst recommendations, financial statements, and full market coverage

AAPL.title: Apple Reports Strong Q1 Earnings Beat
AAPL.summary: Apple Inc. exceeded analyst expectations with Q1 earnings driven by robust iPhone 15 sales and services growth.

AAPL.title: Apple Vision Pro Launch Exceeds Expectations
AAPL.summary: The new Vision Pro headset sees strong initial demand with pre-orders selling out quickly.

NVDA.title: NVIDIA AI Chip Demand Continues to Surge
NVDA.summary: NVIDIA reports record quarterly revenue as AI data center demand shows no signs of slowing.
